case_title: AUDREY REYES et al VS. ETHEL PAULINE ENNON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REYES, AUDREY REYES, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT ENNON, ETHEL PAULINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED SEP-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENNON, ETHEL PAULINE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
